action.reasoning: Observation: baseline direct goal-compass controller reaches only ~24 safe steps and fails to handle walls/long-range pursuit; simulator introspection partially succeeded and showed agent manager/pathfinder are accessible. Analysis: a heuristic expert should navigate to the moving humanoid via navmesh waypoints rather than direct line-of-sight. Decision: run a targeted pose/pathfinder introspection to identify exact articulated-agent position fields and ShortestPath API behavior, then update predict.py/model.py with a waypoint controller.
